info.name: Share Audit Dashboard
info.summary: Visual audit dashboard for all shares across your instance
info.description:
Share Audit Dashboard gives administrators a single, visual overview of every share on the instance: user, group, public link, email, federated, and Talk shares.
Features: - Dashboard with counters and trends per share type - Filterable, searchable, server-side paginated list of all shares - Security alerts: public links without password or expiration, oversharing, sensitive files exposed publicly - Human-readable permissions (no cryptic numbers) - CSV export for compliance and auditing
Unlike the CLI-only sharelisting app, everything is available in the browser for any administrator.
info.author: Ricardo Ferreira
